project: OmniPresence Super Engine — Phase 12 Index Expansion & Calibration

tasks.title: Honest keyword volume via Trends extrapolation + log buckets + confidence
tasks.acceptance: getTrendsComparison batches 4 targets + a known-volume anchor (max 5) so the anchor normalizes each batch; GSC top-10 query (impressions ≈ volume) seeds the anchor; volumes show a log bucket + confidence chip (high=Keyword Planner, medium=Trends-extrapolated ±30%, low=relative/heuristic); never claims KP precision.

tasks.title: Keyless global domain rank (rank.to) blended into Popularity Index
tasks.acceptance: rank.to no-auth JSON API returns daily global ranks + 30-day trend; rankToPopularityScore maps rank->0-100 (log); blended at weight 0.4, still labeled relative (not visits).

tasks.title: Real-user CrUX field data + unified competitive matrix
tasks.acceptance: PageSpeed captures origin-level CrUX field LCP/CLS/INP + overall assessment (reliable with PAGESPEED_API_KEY, degrades to 'no field data' on keyless quota); competitive-snapshot fetches shared signals ONCE/domain and derives popularity + authority; matrix shows brand vs up to 4 competitors with popularity/authority/global rank/CWV + tech stacks.

tasks.title: Real keyword difficulty from the authority of ranking domains (Ahrefs-style, keyless)
tasks.acceptance: App-side keyless scorer derives KD from the Tranco authority of the domains actually ranking (SERP via Serper/Brave/OmniData) so app-only users get real KD instead of a flat 50; OmniData estimateKeywordDifficulty uses OpenPageRank authority of ranking domains (pure computeDifficulty, parity-tested) with graceful heuristic fallback; difficulty labeled ranking_authority vs heuristic and surfaced with a 'real' marker in the keywords table.

tasks.title: Authority beyond Tranco top-1M via keyless rank.to fallback
tasks.acceptance: resolveDomainAuthority chains Tranco (top-1M) -> rank.to (millions, no-auth) -> unlisted; authority-rating + competitive-snapshot use it (reusing pre-fetched rank.to rank), with a lower weight for the rank.to-derived proxy and an authoritySource label; smaller real domains get a non-zero authority instead of 'unranked'.

tasks.title: Capability flags + Phase 12 spec + manifest v12 + loop skill + env docs
tasks.acceptance: Phase 12 capability flags advertised; spec + manifest v12 + loop skill + env note (optional PAGESPEED_API_KEY for field CWV) updated; verify:all + omnidata:parity green.

tasks.title: Keyless Google Trends demand index + related/rising
tasks.acceptance: Trends explore->widgetdata flow returns interest-over-time + related/rising queries; keywords blend a 0-100 demand index labeled data_source=trends_estimated (Keyword Planner stays the real bucketed upgrade); /v3/keywords/trends/live exposed; degrades to available=false on rate-limit.

tasks.title: Open-source tech-stack fingerprint detection
tasks.acceptance: Rule-based fingerprints over HTML/headers/cookies/meta detect frameworks, CMS, ecommerce, analytics, CDN and servers; /v3/tech/detect exposed; intelligence page shows competitor tech stacks labeled best-effort fingerprint.

tasks.title: Honest relative Popularity Index (never absolute traffic)
tasks.acceptance: Popularity Index (0-100) blends Tranco + Common Crawl referring domains + Wikipedia pageviews + domain age, explicitly labeled relative (not visits); /v3/domain/popularity/live exposed; surfaced per competitor.

tasks.title: Unified Authority Rating (AR 0-100, Ahrefs-DR-style, free signals)
tasks.acceptance: Authority Rating blends Tranco + Common Crawl referring domains + OpenPageRank (when OmniData active) + domain age; feeds the OmniPresence authority component and the AEO authority lever via domainAuthority.

tasks.title: Hacker News mentions + Wikipedia/Wikidata entity presence
tasks.acceptance: Algolia HN search adds real hacker_news mentions (platform constraint extended); Wikipedia + Wikidata presence boosts the AEO entity lever and is fetched during scans.

tasks.title: Bug fix + capability flags + UI + parity tests + docs + manifest v11
tasks.acceptance: runInstantPage word_count/images_without_alt bug fixed; keyless free-signal capability flags advertised; keywords table shows relative demand; parity tests cover tech-detect; Phase 11 spec + manifest v11 + loop skill + deploy/env docs updated; verify:all + omnidata:parity green.
